About

Dr. Haitham A. El-Ghareeb

A scholar and academic building a structured digital presence around scholarly identity, publications, critical editions, articles, and research-facing intellectual work, with a strong emphasis on Islamic studies and organized knowledge presentation.

Profile

A scholarly website with a clear purpose

This website is intended to serve as a central reference point for biography, books, critical editions, articles, and future scholarly projects in a unified bilingual format.

Aim

Why this platform exists

Its purpose is to gather academic and intellectual work in one place and present it in an orderly, modern, and expandable digital structure.

Current research-facing themes

Interests reflected in the current project plan

Islamic Studies

A central theme in the planned structure and scholarly direction of the site.

Critical Editing and Manuscripts

A dedicated space is reserved for editorial and manuscript-related scholarly work.

Defense of Sunnah

One of the specialized intellectual areas highlighted in the broader site vision.

AI and Islamic Heritage

A forward-looking theme connecting contemporary tools with heritage scholarship.

E-Learning in Islamic Studies

An interest in structured educational delivery and scholarly digital communication.

Articles and Projects

The site is designed to support ongoing publication and documented scholarly initiatives.

About the site

Dr. Haitham A. El-Ghareeb | Personal Scholarly Website

An initial launch edition of a bilingual scholarly website presenting academic work, publications, and research directions.

Current status

This release is a structured first edition, with detailed content and additional scholarly sections to be expanded progressively.
